info.name: Asana Portfolios API
info.description:
The Asana Portfolios API allows developers to manage portfolios that give a high-level overview of the status of multiple initiatives. Portfolios have a max of 1500 items and a maximum of 20 custom fields.

Contact Support:
 Name: Asana Support

request.description: Returns the compact project records for all items in the portfolio.
